title: Newton-Raphson (NR) Method Optimization Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of the Newton-Raphson method for finding a local minimum in convex optimization.
elements: Solve H(xₖ)p = -∇f(xₖ) for search direction p
relationships: Sequential flow from initial guess through gradient/hessian calculation, direction solving, parameter update, and convergence check, looping back until the optimum is found
